free_text: Intermediate structure studies of 234U cross sections
dates updated, converted to lower case.
BP: Updated to latest standards, digitized
Harvey-Atta area analysis of transmission data
and area analysis of fission cross section
resonances. Total width assumed to Be sum of neutron
width, radiative width, and fission width.
Data errors given are statistical errors
Negative values of the fission widths occur by
statistical chance when, at an energy where a
resonance is indicated by the total cross section, the
fission cross section is lower than the background
value derived from extended regions of the data which
No information on source of uncertainty.
181 mg of 234U on eight circular deposits of 7.6 cm
in diameter on 0.0127 cm of aluminum in the
plates of 234U and one plate with 235U.
R7273. Below 100 eV, from de Saussure, ORNL-TM-1804.
No information on source of uncertainty.
Some data deleted, remaining data averaged
over three points by compiler as per author request.
